Before proceeding further, it is necessary to mention clearly what
a 8hava·house is, and which planet is to be taken as the lord of a Bhava·
house.
A house commences from the cusp of a house and ends with the
succeeding cusp. The cusp of the ascendant is 1'00'. So the tagna
commences at 1'00' Cancer. The next rusp falls at 26°56'. Hence Lagna
Bhava is ruled by Moon. It extends from 1°00' to 26'56'. Funher Moon
is also the tord of tl'lt second house as the se<ond cusp fans at 26°56:
